name: Integration - Escalation Endpoint Success
description: Tests the /api/assistant/escalate endpoint with valid issue details and user context, ensuring escalation workflow triggers notification and audit logging.
input: POST to /api/assistant/escalate with JSON body containing issue_details and user_context.
output: JSON response with success: true and confirmation of escalation.
success_criteria: response['response'] contains 'Issue escalated to human staff'
